vision: Build a state-of-the-art physical–digital collectibles platform with secure claim, social loops, and engaging mini-games.

now.title: Beta exit vertical slice (UI + Arena + asset expansion)
now.detail: Remove user-facing 3D, ship static art-driven character pages, expand roster/assets, and add real-time 2D arena proof-of-concept with rotation/missions loop.

now.title: Secure claim flow v1 (server-first)
now.detail: Persist challenge nonces with TTL, verify HMAC using per-unit salt, hash codes at rest, and atomically bind ownership.

now.title: Claim UI integration
now.detail: Wire claim page to start/complete APIs with client HMAC signing and success state.

now.title: Verify endpoint + UI
now.detail: Add /api/claim/verify and enhance claim page with verify-only flow and design polish.

now.title: Dev user endpoint
now.detail: Temporary GET /api/dev/user to create/fetch a demo user until auth lands.

now.title: Character page SSR
now.detail: Server component for /character/[id] loading from Redis-backed repo with not-found UI.

now.title: No-DB preview mode
now.detail: In-memory repository fallback for claim + character routes to run without Redis.

now.title: DX: Docker + env example
now.detail: Add Upstash env example, npm scripts, README quickstart.

now.title: Basic rate limiting
now.detail: In-memory limiter for claim and dev-user endpoints, 429 on abuse.

now.title: Explore page listing
now.detail: List characters from repo and link to SSR character pages.

now.title: Brand refresh v1
now.detail: Youthful hero, font swap to Space Grotesk, gradient accents, nav tweaks.

now.title: Explore: carousel redesign
now.detail: Dark glass app frame, grid backdrop, tilted card carousel wired to character data.

now.title: UX cohesion + Inventory v1
now.detail: Unify header/footer across pages, set dev user cookie, add /me (My Pals) inventory, and surface ownership badges in listings.

now.title: 3D viewer on character & inventory
now.detail: Embed client-only 3D model viewer on /character/[id] and /me entries using existing component and default model mapping.

now.title: Dev login + profile
now.detail: Add /login dev credentials (admin/admin), set cp_user cookie, and create /u/[handle] profile page.

now.title: CXP Wave 1 import + verify hashing
now.detail: CLI importer for CXP codes, Redis structure updates, and verify endpoint returning character previews.

now.title: Perf: batch character fetch + atomic claim
now.detail: Batch character lookups, add atomic claim flow, and reduce Redis round trips for ownership flows.

now.title: Perf: MMO token avatar cache + API runtime overhead pass
now.detail: Cache owned avatar IDs for MMO token minting, bound in-memory rate-limit fallback growth, replace sync style-status FS reads, and add short cache headers for read-heavy GET APIs.

now.title: Perf: Character identifier miss-path hardening
now.detail: Remove paginated roster scans for unknown character identifiers and rely on indexed lookups plus lore fallback to avoid O(n) miss-path cost.

now.title: Perf: Session provider scope reduction in app shell
now.detail: Remove global SessionProvider from root layout, scope session context to auth-dependent routes, and keep root header auth controls lightweight without next-auth/react in the shared shell path.

now.title: Perf: Header navigation de-JS pass
now.detail: Convert global header navigation to server-rendered markup and remove AppNav from client runtime modules to shrink always-loaded interactive shell code.

now.title: Landing visual refinement (soft sci-fi + playful)
now.detail: Refresh palette, typography, and landing sections for a refined sci-fi collectible aesthetic.

now.title: Sunlit theme refresh
now.detail: Replace the dark palette with a warm cream + sky gradient system across layout and key pages.

now.title: Legibility pass on /me
now.detail: Align mission tracker and roster surfaces to light theme text tokens and remove white-on-light collisions.

now.title: Explore page style and motion cleanup
now.detail: Align /explore visuals with claim page tokens, simplify roster/spotlight transitions, and fix desktop roster-to-spotlight layout.

now.title: Champion profile metrics + identity + gallery polish
now.detail: Refine performance metric hover/tier visuals, add richer identity highlight styling, and compress gallery into a compact differentiated asset reel.

now.title: Legacy character profile + art recovery
now.detail: Restore missing legacy roster lore/art mappings, generate dedicated per-character art folders, and harden profile routing to resolve id, slug, and lore-backed identifiers.

now.title: Plaza startup and handshake stability
now.detail: Fix local MMO server startup command, harden WS payload decode, and prevent bundled ws bufferutil runtime failures that caused handshake timeouts.

now.title: Standalone MMO token secret alignment
now.detail: Load Next-style env before importing plaza server so standalone mmo server uses the same token secret and no longer rejects valid tokens with invalid_token.

now.title: Dual-process MMO startup hardening
now.detail: Avoid duplicate WS binds in local dual-process dev by probing port availability, treating occupied port as external runtime, and adding a safe combined launcher script.

now.title: Firefox CSS parse warnings cleanup
now.detail: Fix invalid Tailwind arbitrary grid column syntax and remove accidental arbitrary class extraction from bracketed dev log tags.

now.title: Play battle arcade rebuild + legibility
now.detail: Replace washed-out stat battle cards with a high-contrast single-canvas arcade mode, deterministic test hooks, and validated controls/end states.

now.title: Auth: passwordless email (magic link)
now.detail: Integrate Auth.js (NextAuth) email provider; store users; session in RSC.

now.title: Redis persistence baseline
now.detail: Define Upstash data layout, seed minimal sample units, and document env setup.

next.title: MMO: Feature spec v1
next.detail: Define Plaza scope, player count, interactions, performance targets, risks, and success metrics.

next.title: MMO: Tech RFC v1
next.detail: Authoritative server, WS protocol, smoothing, interest mgmt, and deployment plan.

next.title: MMO: Token API
next.detail: Next.js route to mint short-lived WS tokens gated by ownership or dev users.

next.title: MMO: Protocol TS types
next.detail: Define client/server message and state types for the Plaza prototype.

next.title: Collectible scan plan
next.detail: Document schema, APIs, and anti-fraud flow for QR/NFC scanning + auto claim sync.

next.title: Palette refresh (feminine)
next.detail: Shift core gradient + surfaces to Rosette Prism hues without changing layout components.

next.title: MMO: Prototype room
next.detail: Spin up a small WS server (Colyseus or ws) with 3-player movement replication.

next.title: Server Actions for claim + ownership
next.detail: Move claim finalize to a Server Action and show optimistic UI.

next.title: Invite flow v1
next.detail: Create invites table APIs + UI; grant cosmetics to inviter/recipient.

next.title: Anti-abuse guards
next.detail: Add per-IP and per-user rate limits on claim routes; basic anomaly logging.

later.title: Mini-game polish + score submit
later.detail: Runner loop, collision, score persistence, track-aware leaderboards, and server-backed attempt validation.

later.title: Share cards (OG images)
later.detail: Dynamic OG image endpoint per character and result.

later.title: CI: typecheck, lint, build
later.detail: GitHub Actions workflow for PRs to run tsc, eslint, next build.

later.title: Tests: Vitest/Jest baseline
later.detail: Unit tests for src/lib crypto + API claim flow via memory repo.
